CREATE TABLE xml_documents (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, content TEXT);
INSERT INTO xml_documents (id, content) VALUES (1, '<!DOCTYPE note><note><to>Tove</to><from>Jani</from><heading>Reminder</heading><body>Don't forget me this weekend!</body></note>');
INSERT INTO xml_documents (id, content) VALUES (2, '<!DOCTYPE note><note><to>Tove<to><from>Jani</from><heading>Reminder</heading><body>Don't forget me this weekend!</body></note>');

DECLARE _result VARCHAR; _result := xml_validate_dtd((SELECT content FROM xml_documents WHERE id = 1), 0, 'http://localhost.localdomain/xmlrepository', 'UTF-8', 'x-any', 'Validation=SGML FsaBadWs=IGNORE BuildStandalone=ENABLE MaxErrors=100');
IF (_result = '') THEN _result := 'NO ERRORS DETECTED'; END IF;

DECLARE _result VARCHAR; _result := xml_validate_dtd((SELECT content FROM xml_documents WHERE id = 2), 0, 'http://localhost.localdomain/xmlrepository', 'UTF-8', 'x-any', 'Validation=SGML FsaBadWs=IGNORE BuildStandalone=ENABLE MaxErrors=100');
CREATE TABLE xml_validation_results (doc_id INTEGER, validation_result TEXT);

INSERT INTO xml_validation_results (doc_id, validation_result) SELECT 2, xml_validate_dtd((SELECT content FROM xml_documents WHERE id = 2), 0, 'http://localhost.localdomain/xmlrepository', 'UTF-8', 'x-any', 'Validation=SGML FsaBadWs=IGNORE BuildStandalone=ENABLE MaxErrors=100') UNION ALL SELECT 1, _result FROM xml_documents WHERE id = 1;
SELECT * FROM xml_validation_results WHERE validation_result != 'NO ERRORS DETECTED';
DELETE FROM xml_documents WHERE id = 1 OR id = 2;
